<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column G. From my position, moving forward would go into lava at row 02 column C (`L`), so I should turn to avoid lava. Looking ahead from this orientation: right is unsafe, while down (row 03 column B) is floor (`.`). I will turn left to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
Now I’m at row 02 column B facing up (`^`). Forward would go into a wall at row 01 column B (`#`), so I must rotate. To move toward the goal on the lower rows without hitting lava, I should face down (`v`) so I can step to row 03 column B which is safe (`.`). Turning right from up (`^`) will make me face right (`>`), while turning left will make me face left (`<`). I need down, so I will turn right twice; but only one action is allowed now—turn right to start rotating toward down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column G, so I need to move downward through the safe corridor in column B (rows 03-08 column B are `.`). Moving forward right would hit lava at row 02 column C (`L`), so I should turn to face down (`v`). From facing right, turning left gives down. 
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I’m back at row 02 column B facing up (`^`) again. Forward is a wall (`#`) at row 01 column B, so I need to face down (`v`) to descend. From up (`^`), turning right twice would yield down, but one step now: turn right to face right (`>`), continuing the rotation toward down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
At row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The cell in front at row 02 column C is `L` (lava), so I must not move forward. To go toward the corridor below column B (safe `.` at row 03 column B), I need to face down (`v`). From facing right, turning right will face down.
</thought>
<action>

</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 02 column B facing down (`v`). The cell in front (row 03 column B) is `.` (safe). So I can move forward toward the lower open area and eventually reach the goal at row 08 column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
